headline: ES Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Five-Year Capex Plan Raised
summary: Eversource Energy beat Q1 earnings estimates and raises its 2026-2030 capital plan by $2.3B as revenues climb across key business segments.

headline: Assessing Whether PPL (PPL) Is Undervalued After Mixed Short And Long Term Returns
summary: Why PPL might be on your watchlist today PPL (PPL) is drawing attention after a recent stretch of mixed returns, including a negative move over the past month and a gain over the past 3 months, prompting fresh questions about the stock’s current pricing. See our latest analysis for PPL. The recent 1 week and 1 month share price returns of 4.60% and 4.75% declines contrast with a 90 day share price return of 3.39% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 4.74%.
